CommandLine: "C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "E:\Edge devices\01-sustained-mobile-inference\scripts\run_litert_lm_benchmark.ps1" -RunId 20260612-083526-MBH-N49-bai4-npu-controlled-50iter-long-npu -DeviceLabel MBH-N49 -ModelId gemma4-e2b-sm8750 -DeviceSerial AWRT025806000280 -PromptId mobile_prompt_long -PromptLengthBucket long -RequestedOutputBucket medium -PreferredBackend NPU -Prompt "You are a local mobile assistant. Summarize a benchmark session in three bullet points, mention the winning backend, describe the thermal trend, and add one limitation about plugged USB power." -Iterations 50 -Warmup 3

"C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8;
$targets = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'powershell*' -and ($_.CommandLine -match '20260612-083526-MBH-N49-bai4-npu-controlled|run_mobile_prompt_backend_matrix|run_litert_lm_benchmark|collector_') }
$checkpoint='04-failure-aware-mobile-llm-benchmarking/artifacts/checkpoints/20260612-0910-phone-returned-to-user'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $checkpoint | Out-Null
$targets | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 (Join-Path $checkpoint 'stopped-phone-processes.json')
foreach ($p in $targets) { if ($p.ProcessId -ne $PID) { Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
$adb='E:\Edge devices\01-sustained-mobile-inference\tools\android\platform-tools\adb.exe'
& $adb shell am force-stop com.example.qnn_litertlm_gemma | Out-Null
& $adb shell am force-stop com.example.gemma_on_device | Out-Null
Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
$summary=@()
$summary += '# Phone returned to user checkpoint'
$summary += ''
$summary += \"Time: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss zzz')\"
$summary += ''
$summary += 'Stopped the active phone NPU controlled matrix and collectors because the user needs the phone.'
$summary += ''
$summary += 'Partial result before stopping:'
$summary += '- short/NPU completed with summary.'
$summary += '- medium/NPU was stuck/no benchmark CSV; it was interrupted and should be treated as partial/invalid unless later summarized carefully.'
$summary += '- long/NPU was active when the stop request came; treat as interrupted/invalid unless valid CSV exists.'
$summary | Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 (Join-Path $checkpoint 'checkpoint-summary.md')
Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'powershell*' -and ($_.CommandLine -match '20260612-083526-MBH-N49-bai4-npu-controlled|run_mobile_prompt_backend_matrix|run_litert_lm_benchmark|collector_') } | Select-Object ProcessId,CommandLine
Get-Content -Raw (Join-Path $checkpoint 'checkpoint-summary.md')"
